case_title: JOSEPH CHERNEY VS. A-1 LIMOUSINE SERVICES, INC. A CALIF. CORP.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHERNEY, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT A-1 LIMOUSINE SERVICES, INC. A CALIF. CORP. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHERNEY, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT A-1 LIMOUSINE SERVICES, INC. A CALIF. CORP. $777.46 PRINCIPAL, $99.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $876.46, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
